case_title: WENDY HOWARD VS. WONDA ENGINE L.L.C.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD, WENDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONDA ENGINE L.L.C. $784.81 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $784.81, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THE REVERSED CHARGE ON PLAINTIFF'S CREDIT CARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,120.00 FILED BY HOWARD, WENDY AS TO DEFENDANT WONDA ENGINE L.L.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, WENDY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, WENDY AS TO DEFENDANT WONDA ENGINE L.L.C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-28-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONDA ENGINE L.L.C.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WONDA ENGINE L.L.C.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
